name: atomr-accel
description: Skills and plugins for working on projects that depend on atomr-accel, the GPU-acceleration crate family for the atomr actor runtime.

plugins.name: atomr-accel-ai-skills
plugins.description: Skills for AI coding assistants working on projects that depend on atomr-accel — getting started, device driving, kernel selection, supervision, Python bindings, backend choice, and troubleshooting.
